summary: Full E2E regression test for FREE11 IPL 2026 app (iteration 36). Focus: new features — FirstTimeTutorial (7-step), IPL countdown banner, simplified single-page registration OTP flow, PWA install nudge banner, Web OTP API OTP UI. Also covered: Landing, Login, Dashboard, Predict, Watch&Earn, Shop, Leaderboard, Sponsored, Admin, Blog, Profile, Share card, Backend health. 32/32 backend tests pass (100%). All new features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Rookie' rank in user header when demandProgress hasn't loaded yet (falls back to 'Rookie' via `demandProgress?.rank?.name || 'Rookie'`). Profile page correctly shows 'Amateur' for same user with 110 XP. Minor timing/fallback issue.

issues: Leaderboard tab switcher uses icon-only tabs (no text labels). Users may not know which icon = Global/Weekly/Streak. Minor accessibility concern.

register_page.dev_otp_display: INFO — Not shown (Resend API returns HTTP 200, email considered delivered)

pwa_install_banner.code_verified: PASS — App.js has PWAInstallBanner with data-testid='pwa-install-banner', 'pwa-install-btn', 'pwa-remind-later-btn'
pwa_install_banner.dismiss_logic: PASS — 'Remind Later' and X button call handleLater → setShow(false)
pwa_install_banner.not_testable_headless: INFO — beforeinstallprompt event does not fire in headless Chrome. Banner only shows when browser fires the event (or window.__pwaPrompt is set).

action_items: MINOR: Dashboard UserHeader shows 'Rookie' fallback when demandProgress hasn't loaded. Consider using user.rank_name from user object directly if available to avoid the brief incorrect display.
MINOR: Leaderboard tabs are icon-only — consider adding tooltip or small text label for accessibility (Global/Weekly/Streak).
INFO: PWA install banner verified in code (data-testid attributes correct, nudge logic correct) but cannot be tested in headless — requires real device with Chrome PWA install eligibility.
INFO: Web OTP API (navigator.credentials.get) verified in Register.js code, no testing required per review spec.
critical_code_review_comments: ARCHITECTURE GOOD: FirstTimeTutorial (Dashboard) and HowToPlay (MatchCentre) are separate components but share the same /api/user/tutorial-status endpoint — completing either marks tutorial as done. This is intentional design.
TIMING OK: IPLCountdown component correctly calculates days using dayjs and returns null when days <= 0. Banner will auto-hide on March 28, 2026.

PWA BANNER: Logic correctly limits nudges to 5 via pwaInstallNudgeCount localStorage. handleLater only hides for current session (setShow(false)), doesn't increment counter — user will see it again on next page load until 5 nudges reached.
OTP FLOW: Single-page OTP with Framer Motion stage transition working correctly. devOtp fallback correctly shown only when Resend returns non-200.
REDIS: Gracefully handled as 'unavailable' in /api/health — no impact on core functionality.
MOCKED: ONDC/Zepto router, Xoxoday redemption, Razorpay (test mode) — all gracefully mocked.
ENTITYSPORT: Connected and returning real match data.

success_rate.frontend: 97% (all new features verified, 1 minor rank display timing issue, 1 design issue with icon-only tabs)

mocked_apis: Resend email — real API returning HTTP 200 (dev_otp fallback not triggered)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com with 100 coins balance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 required test scenarios passing. New features (Tutorial, IPL Countdown, OTP Registration, PWA banner code) verified. Backend 32/32. Tutorial uses two separate components: FirstTimeTutorial.js (Dashboard) and HowToPlay.js (MatchCentre), both sharing /api/user/tutorial-status endpoint. IPL countdown shows for 18 more days (March 28, 2026). Test user balance: 100 coins (unchanged). Admin V2 at /admin/v2 shows 47 total users. Leaderboard has seed data (lb_seed_1 through lb_seed_5). PWA banner requires real browser beforeinstallprompt event — not testable in headless. Share prediction button is at data-testid='share-prediction-btn' in MatchCentre.

dashboard_rank_display.issue: Dashboard shows 'Rookie' for test user (Amateur Level 2 per Profile page)
dashboard_rank_display.root_cause: Dashboard user header uses `demandProgress?.rank?.name || 'Rookie'`. If demandProgress API call is in-flight or failed, fallback is always 'Rookie' regardless of user.level.
dashboard_rank_display.reproduction: Navigate to /dashboard — briefly see 'Rookie' even for Level 2+ users
dashboard_rank_display.mitigation: Use user.rank_name or calculate rank from user.xp directly as fallback, or use the rank name from user object if available. This is a cosmetic issue only — Profile page shows correct rank.
